description_long: This is a round, black plastic jar with a matte finish, designed for wound healing cream. The lid is adorned with a gold decorative border and a central bird logo, giving it an elegant and traditional appearance. The front of the jar features the brand name 'SAYAR KHO' and the product description in gold lettering. The sides of the jar display additional information in Burmese script, likely including usage instructions and manufacturer details. The jar is compact and squat, with a wide mouth and a screw-on cap for easy access to the contents. The overall design is both functional and visually appealing, suitable for display in personal care or pharmacy settings.
description: A round, black plastic jar with gold decorative accents and a screw-on lid, labeled for wound healing cream.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold bird logo, ornate border, and 'SAYAR KHO' branding with product name.
description_view_1: Side view displaying Burmese script, likely product information and instructions, with the decorative lid visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more Burmese text and a clear view of the jar's wide, smooth body.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring additional Burmese script, possibly manufacturer details and contact information.
